name: Onconetix, Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview We are a commercial stage biotechnology company focused on the research, development, and commercialization of innovative solutions for mens health and oncology. Through our acquisition of Proteomedix, which closed on December 15, 2023, we own Proclarix, an in vitro diagnostic test for prostate cancer originally developed by Proteomedix and approved for sale in the European Union under the In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation (IVDR), which we anticipate will be marketed in the ...
